name: memoryai
description: Persistent memory layer for LLMs — MCP server, REST API, auto-distillation

scripts.dev: docker-compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d && npm run dev -w packages/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/sdk
